title: DNA Extraction for college laboratory setting
author: James M. Burnette III
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.dwu7ev

steps.title: Label Tubes
steps.instruction: Label one tube for each plant.

steps.title: Harvest and Grind Tissue
steps.instruction: Harvest 2-3 seedlings and place in a mortar. Fill with about 50 ml of liquid nitrogen. Grind tissue with pestle.

steps.title: Add Extraction Buffer
steps.instruction: Add 1 ml of extraction buffer to the tube.

steps.title: Add SDS and Mix
steps.instruction: Add 120 µl of 10% SDS. Mix by inverting. If preparing more than one sample, prepare each sample to this step and place on ice.

steps.title: Add KOAc and Incubate on Ice
steps.instruction: Add 300 µl 5M KOAc. Mix well by inverting several times (important!), then place on ice 5 minutes. Stopping point: Samples can be frozen for a future class period. Thaw samples before starting with step 7.

steps.title: Centrifuge Sample
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 minutes at >12,000 rpm. Label a second tube.

steps.title: Transfer Supernatant
steps.instruction: Pass 700 µl of the supernatant through a miracloth funnel into the second tube.

steps.title: Add Isopropanol and Mix
steps.instruction: Add 600 µl of isopropanol. Mix the contents thoroughly by inverting. Stopping point: Samples can be frozen for a future class period.

steps.title: Carefully Remove Supernatant
steps.instruction: Carefully pour off and discard the supernatant. Use a P20 set to 20 µl to remove the remaining drops of liquid without disturbing the DNA pellet.

steps.title: Wash Pellet with Ethanol
steps.instruction: Add 500 µl of 70% ethanol and flick the tube until the pellet comes off the bottom.

steps.title: Carefully Remove Ethanol
steps.instruction: Pour off the ethanol. Use a P20 set to 20 µl to remove the remaining drops without disturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Air Dry Pellet
steps.instruction: Leave the tube open on the bench to air dry for 5-10 minutes.

steps.title: Resuspend DNA
steps.instruction: Resuspend the DNA in 50 µl TE and incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes for complete resuspension. Samples should be frozen for storage.
